features.name: verilator public flag with dotted function call
features.description: Code should include a compilation unit where Verilator is invoked with --public flag combined with code containing dotted function calls through hierarchical paths

features.name: inlined function with dotted hierarchical access
features.description: Code should include a function marked for inlining that accesses a dotted hierarchical path like obj.subobj.field or inst.array.member
features.snippet: function automatic logic get_val(); return this.inst.array[0].field; endfunction

features.name: function inlining with public signals
features.description: Code should include signals that are both marked as public and accessed through inlined function dotted paths, where the --public flag causes incorrect optimization decisions
features.snippet: (* public *) logic [31:0] data; function automatic logic read(); return data; endfunction
